name: Zakuro Fujiwara
description: **Height:** 172 cm (5'8") Zakuro Fujiwara is the last of the main Mew Mews introduced. Her DNA is merged with a Grey Wolf. Zakuro went to a prestigious school and was fully educated. Much of her past isn't mentioned in the manga but is shown more in the anime. It was mentioned in one episode, that she used to live in America, as she left 'home' two years before the series started. His father is a Shinto priest. He is "everything-what-zombie-freak". He makes a potion that can bring the dead back to life. name: Hae-Jun Go
description: A second-year high school student who can see ghosts. He recently transferred to a new school, and due to his mother's obsession with the supernatural, he's desperate to leave home and stay in the school dorms. After a tragic accident, he finally gets his wish, but ends up in a run-down old house which is supposedly haunted. name: Helck
description: __Height:__ 200cm (6'7") __Power level:__ 99 The titular human hero Helck. He is the older brother of the hero Cless. Immensely strong, reliable, and capable, Helck seeks to become the champion of demons and destroy the humans.

name: Kouyou Ozaki
description: **Height:** 171 cm (5'6") **Ability:** Golden Demon, 金色夜叉 or Konjiki Yasha. Executive Member of the Port Mafia.

name: Makoto Takiya
description: [Kobayashi](https://anilist.co/character/120969)'s co-worker who is initially believed by [Tohru](https://anilist.co/character/120970) to be a rival for Kobayashi's affections, but is really just an otaku who likes to talk about maids with her. Kobayashi helps him set up during Comiket every year. ~![Fafnir](https://anilist.co/character/120971) eventually decides to live with him to stay in the human world.!~

name: Ren Hazuki
description: __Height:__ 163 cm Ren Hazuki is a main character in Love Live! Superstar!!. She is currently a third year student at Yuigaoka Girls' High School. She is a first-generation member of Liella! and a member of the sub-unit KALEIDOSCORE. Her image color is sapphire blue. Ren is polite and speaks with a very formal tone, although she is not quite used to handling casual conversations. Having been told as a child to refrain from spending too much time online, she also has difficulty communicating on c

name: Saki Aoi
description: A first year student at the same school as [Makoto](https://anilist.co/character/261092/Makoto-Hanaoka) and [Ryuuji.](https://anilist.co/character/261090/Ryuuji-Taiga) She is cheerful and naive, initially mistaking Makoto for a girl when she confesses her feelings. She lives with her grandmother.

name: Yoruka Kirihime
description: She was the princess of the fallen nation of Koto, later becoming an assassin for the Old Arcadia Empire and then a student of the New Kingdom's Royal Officer Academy.

name: Aishia
description: A mysterious girl only Rio can hear. When Rio got attacked by an assassin, she taught him how to manipulate his Ode and use Spirit arts. ~!She's an upper-high class spirit whose been contracted to him since the beginning of the series. She takes on a humanoid form, which is very rare for spirits. She apparently has no memories of her time before meeting Rio. She also seems to know of his previous life as Haruto, as she refers to him by that when they're alone and/or with trusted friends!~

name: Cocona Cocomine
description: A second-year middle school student who lives with her grandmother. She's an honor student who serves as the class representative. Because of her cautious personality, she's unable to step foot into new opportunities.

name: Ga-Eul
description: Video editor of Ho-Bin Yoo. She is one year younger than Ho-Bin and Ji-Hyeok.

name: Hajime Aoyama
description: Hajime is Satsuki's neighbor. He is always strong and courageous to help defeat the ghosts, but though he says that this is very brave, he is actually a coward. Despite this, he is one of the most reliable of Satsuki's friends and has saved her on more than one occasion. Hajime also has a naughty habit of flipping girls' skirts, and his constant victim is no other than Satsuki. This results in frequent comic moments. Throughout the anime, it seems that Hajime and Satsuki develop mutual crushes o

name: Honey Kisaragi
description: Honey Kisaragi is a regular Catholic schoolgirl, until the day her father is murdered by the "Panther Claw" Organization. After his death, she learns she is actually an android created by him and within her is the Fixed System of Air Elements. By saying "Honey Flash!" she can transform into the sword-wielding red-haired superhero, Cutie Honey.

name: Iroha Tamaki
description: Iroha came to Kamihama to investigate strange dreams she was having. Kind-hearted, she tends to worry too much about others. She's not up on the latest trends and isn't good with her phone. Usually reserved, she can be a fighter when it matters most.

name: Eiji Kitahama
description: Eiji Kitahama is the love interest of [Rin Nanakura](https://anilist.co/character/140039). While attending Kouban High, he meets Rin at his drama club. Rin decides to fulfill his wish of having a harem.

name: Hanazono
description: **Occupation:** Spy **Affiliation:** Lamplight **Skills:** She has a knack on concocting poisons that can either paralyze or kill her targets. Lily is one of the main protagonists in the Spy Classroom series. She is the team leader of Lamplight. She wants to become a spy due to her life being saved by one after she survived a poison gas attack during the Great War. Due to her concern for the Lamplight team and her own skills, she is designated by Klaus to be the team leader for Lamplight.

name: Hiroto Ikuta
description: A freeter. He works part-time at a fishing place. He has no girlfriend, but old ladies seem to really like him.

name: Ikuno
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'7") Pilots the Franxx Chlorophytum with Mitsuru.

name: Kazuma Yagami
description: Height: 176 cm (estimation) Real name: Kannagi Kazuma (神凪和麻) Kazuma is a former member of the Kannagi household. He was banished from the family by his father after he was defeated by Ayano during the Successor Ceremony for the Enraiha, his family's sacred sword. Since Kazuma is a son from the main family, making him the legitimate successor, even his own father considered him a disgrace for lacking the power to use fire magic, his family's specialty. name: Kinji Ninomiya
description: Kinji Ninomiya is a young man overflowing with extreme overconfidence. Right when he thought he was set to live a cushy NEET lifestyle, he was swept off to another world.

name: Kirie  Konami
description: Kirie is an A-Class agent, member of Tamakoma Branch and Yuuma's mentor. She is a naïve girl who gets tricked easily, who everyone likes to make fun of because she's so gullible, and she tends to make a big ruckus over little things. She also dislikes weaklings, hence why she chose to mentor Yuuma.
